title: Realistic Low Light Phone Style Portrait Young
sourceTitle: Realistic Low Light Phone Style Portrait Young

imagePrompts.prompt:
A realistic low-light phone-style portrait of a young adult woman seated inside a cozy cafe or restaurant at night. Close half-body framing, roughly 4:5 or near-square crop. Camera held at chest-to-face height, shooting from close range at near eye level or slightly above. Her face, shoulders, neck, hand and upper body fill most of the frame. Not a mirror selfie, no phone visible covering her face, and not a bright studio look.

She faces the camera with her body turned slightly, holding a metal fork upright near her chin and lips, as if dinner conversation paused for a beat before another bite. Calm, soft gaze meeting the lens with a touch of curiosity. Lips slightly parted or naturally relaxed, no big smile. The shot should read as a casual candid that someone across the table just snapped, natural but lightly composed.

Hair is deep black-brown to natural black, loosely tied up or half-up, with soft volume at the crown and loose face-framing strands on both sides. A faint dark sheen catches the warm low light, edges slightly blurred. Stray strands rest near her cheeks and neck for a real, lived-in restaurant feel. Keep her soft oval face, delicate features, large eyes, natural nose bridge and gentle lip shape. Makeup follows a warm East Asian restaurant-selfie style: translucent base, natural straight brows, thin eyeliner, soft under-eye detail, light pink blush, rose-pink or muted bean-pink lips. Low contrast, clean, soft, no heavy makeup, no commercial retouch look.

She wears a white thin-strap camisole with lace trim, a small bow at the neckline, and tiny floral or dotted accents, layered under a warm cream or ivory loose knit cardigan. The cardigan shows visible vertical or open-knit texture and slips a little off one shoulder, revealing the thin strap. Fabric should read soft, warm and tactile: the cardigan looks fuzzy and knitted under warm light, the camisole looks lighter and more delicate.

Visible skin: face, neck, collarbone area, upper shoulders, a small sliver of upper chest, plus hands and wrists. Waist, stomach, back, hips and legs stay out of frame or covered by clothing. Skin tone sits between light warm ivory and soft beige-apricot, looking creamy and warm under yellow restaurant lighting. Face, neck, shoulders and collarbone skin should feel delicate, soft, faintly translucent, lightly moisturized. Keep subtle low-light tonal shifts, soft pores, natural shadows. Avoid over-smoothing or plastic skin.

Background is a nighttime restaurant, cafe or indoor dining space dressed with plants. Dense dark green indoor foliage, warm yellow background lamps, wooden partitions or window-like frames, softly blurred restaurant seating, dark wall surfaces, faint woven chair texture. Main light comes from warm yellow ceiling lamps and ambient back-of-room glow scattering from above and slightly behind, with weak environmental bounce from the front. It paints soft highlights on her forehead, nose bridge, cheeks, collarbone and shoulders. Plants and dark zones absorb some of the light, leaving warm shadows around the edges of her skin. Lamps filtering through leaves cast soft yellow light spots and irregular leaf-shadow shapes.

Keep a low-light smartphone texture: soft edges, mild shadow noise, warm film-like grain, subtle haze, slight compression. Face, hand and fork stay relatively crisp while background plants and warm lights fall into soft bokeh. Overall mood is gentle, quiet, intimate, warmly hazy, as if she had been sitting there for a while, fork in hand, paused mid-conversation, glancing up at the photographer right as the shot was taken.
